description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive pattern of alternating black and white horizontal stripes across its top surface. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel to the shorter edge, creating a visually striking, high-contrast appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, giving the object a bold, modern look. The block appears to be made of a dense stone material, possibly granite or marble, with the white stripes showing a subtle marbled texture. The overall form is geometric and precise, with sharp, clean edges and a flat top surface suitable for supporting weight. This type of block would likely serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment, such as a traffic divider or decorative boundary.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating black and white stripes on top and solid black sides, featuring a modern, high-contrast design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horizontal black and white stripes running left to right across the top surface, with a solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the stripes running vertically from front to back, emphasizing the block's depth and the solid black side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows vertical stripes and a solid black side, similar to view 1.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or divider
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
